Demographic assumption: The elderly population share and dependency ratio continue along observed historical trends
Public financing assumption: Government/public financing share follows the recent average trend
Workforce assumption: LTC workforce capacity follows the recent observed capacity trend
Macroeconomic assumption: GDP per capita follows the recent long-run growth pattern
Forecast role: Reference scenario representing continuation of current demographic and financing conditions

Demographic assumption: The elderly population share and dependency ratio increase faster than the historical baseline
Public financing assumption: Government/public financing share remains unchanged or adjusts slowly
Workforce assumption: The LTC workforce capacity does not expand sufficiently to match accelerated aging
Macroeconomic assumption: GDP per capita follows the baseline growth path
Forecast role: Stress-test scenario showing fiscal exposure under faster population aging

Demographic assumption: The elderly population share and dependency ratio follow the baseline aging path
Public financing assumption: Government/public financing share increases progressively to reflect greater public-sector responsibility
Workforce assumption: LTC workforce capacity follows baseline trend
Macroeconomic assumption: GDP per capita follows the baseline growth path
Forecast role: Financing-policy scenario assessing the effect of stronger public financing participation

Demographic assumption: The elderly population share and dependency ratio follow the baseline aging path
Public financing assumption: Government/public financing share follows baseline trend
Workforce assumption: LTC workforce capacity expands relative to the elderly population
Macroeconomic assumption: GDP per capita follows the baseline growth path
Forecast role: Capacity-building scenario assessing whether workforce expansion moderates health expenditure burden

Demographic assumption: The elderly population share and dependency ratio follow a moderated aging-adaptation path
Public financing assumption: Public financing is adjusted through a balanced reform pathway
Workforce assumption: LTC workforce capacity expands, and service delivery improves
Macroeconomic assumption: GDP per capita follows baseline or moderately improved growth
Forecast role: Integrated policy scenario combining demographic adaptation, financing reform, and workforce strengthening
